cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out whether using the glitch in the multiplayer game is ethical. Let me start by thinking about the different sides of this. On one hand, if I find a glitch that gives me unlimited resources, it's tempting to use it. I could get ahead quickly, maybe even dominate the game. But is that right? First, I should consider the impact on other players. If I use the glitch, it's unfair to others who play by the rules. They might not be able to compete if I have an unfair advantage.
